text:
In this subchapter:

(1) “Department” means the Department of Public Safety.

(2) “Motorcycle” has the meaning assigned that term by Section 661.001 (Definitions) .

(3) “Person” means an individual, partnership, firm, corporation, association, or other private entity.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 680. Misc. Provisions
##### § 680.001 — Definitions

In this subchapter:

    (1) “Department” means the Department of Public Safety.

    (2) “Motorcycle” has the meaning assigned that term by Section 661.001 (Definitions) .

    (3) “Person” means an individual, partnership, firm, corporation, association, or other private entity.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: “Department” means the Department of Public Safety.
“Motorcycle” has the meaning assigned that term by Section 661.001 (Definitions) .
“Person” means an individual, partnership, firm, corporation, association, or other private entity.
